manifest.author: votsz
manifest.changelog:
CHANGELOG DETAILED 🇺🇸

■ The blur when viewing stories is on the entire screen

■ Instagram subscription commands enabled (functional only in the piko)

■ Disabled the scroll break that prevented roll of reels from a while

■ The search tab has had a slight change

■ Developer tab has undergone a redesign

■ Silence button when posting a reels in Stories

■ Change the source of the conversation in direct (⛔️ non-functional)

■ Two new note options to use, poll and games

■ When you hold the airplane button in a story, you can quickly send it to a friend

■ Reply with emojis some note quickly

■ Redesign in the viewers and likes section in a story

■ Improvements in some commands and commands that will arrive soon
manifest.name: votsz's Backup
manifest.description: Backup for those who want new functions before the public, maximum quality and Stable
